title: tp-run-full-design council round-bundle wrapper
description: The wrapper /council --orchestrator returns in ONE fenced json block, wrapping the per-member round outputs (F2). It carries its own schema const so parse_tier_return's class-guard accepts it. outputs[] is typed loosely as object — each is validated against council-round1.v1 (round 1) or council-round2.v1 (round 2) in a second loop (§6), resolved by the orchestrator, not by this schema.
